author: tuyen4818
content:
> The chain split at slot 22688 because Gloas / ePBS envelope propagation broke — the new layer where the beacon block and its e
in lodestar forkchoice debug (both lodestar_nethermind_2 and lodestar_ethrex_1), finalized checkpoint happen later at epoch 710 which is slot 22720
so 22688 is not the chain split, it was pruned in our forkchoice data because it's pre-finalized
